chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 716 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.2946/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 24.08.2023 None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. This petition was filed on 12.04.2023 since then none has pursued it. We have also gone through the contents of the petition and find it not maintainable as the petitioner is seeking possession of his land for which he has adequate remedy before the Civil Court. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in limine along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
